Title: Add prices to the product
Preconditions:
1. Create a new price list [C178828]
2. Add products to the price list [C178829]
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the price list from the first precondition. 
2. Click on the ""Prices"" widget.
3. Go to any product. 
4. Enter the price into the ""List Price"" input field.
5. Click ""Save"". 
Expected Result:
The system saves the entered price and displays the product Price in the ""Price range"" column of the table.

![](index.php?/attachments/get/22871)  

Step Description:
1. Go to the same product again. 
2. Enter the Sale price to the input field. 
3. Click ""Save"". 
Expected Result:
The system saves the changes. The Price range consists of List price and Sale price.

![](index.php?/attachments/get/22872)  

Step Description:
1. Go to the same product again. 
2. Add one more price. 
3. Specify min quantity different from the quantity of price from the previous steps.
4. Enter List and Sales prices to the appropriate input fields. 
5. Click ""Save"".
Expected Result:
1. The system saves changes and the entered prices are displayed in the ""Price range"" column.
2. The number of prices is displayed in the ""#"" column. 
3. The specified price is available for the specified Min. Quantity
Steps (Expected Result):

![](index.php?/attachments/get/22871)  

2. The system saves the changes. The Price range consists of List price and Sale price.

![](index.php?/attachments/get/22872)  

3. 1. The system saves changes and the entered prices are displayed in the ""Price range"" column.
2. The number of prices is displayed in the ""#"" column. 
3. The specified price is available for the specified Min. Quantity
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to the price list from the first precondition. 
2. Click on the ""Prices"" widget.
3. Go to any product. 
4. Enter the price into the ""List Price"" input field.
5. Click ""Save"". 
2. 1. Go to the same product again. 
2. Enter the Sale price to the input field. 
3. Click ""Save"". 
3. 1. Go to the same product again. 
2. Add one more price. 
3. Specify min quantity different from the quantity of price from the previous steps.
4. Enter List and Sales prices to the appropriate input fields. 
5. Click ""Save"".

Title: Price with highest priority is shown on StoreFront
Preconditions: `1. There are two price lists assigned to the same product.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the BackEnd (admin/store)
2. Set priority of the price list assignment #1 higher than the priority of price list assignment #2.
3. Go to the storefront. 
4. Go to the product from preconditions. 
5. Pay attention to the price of the product. 
Expected Result:
Product price = price specified in the price list#1.
Step Description:
1. Go back to the BackEnd (admin/store)
2. Set priority of the price list assignment #2 higher than the priority of price list assignment #2.
3. Go to the storefront. 
4. Reload the page. 
5. Go to the product from preconditions. 
6. Pay attention to the product price. 
Expected Result:
Product price = price specified in the price list#2.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. Product price = price specified in the price list#1.
2. Product price = price specified in the price list#2.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to the BackEnd (admin/store)
2. Set priority of the price list assignment #1 higher than the priority of price list assignment #2.
3. Go to the storefront. 
4. Go to the product from preconditions. 
5. Pay attention to the price of the product. 
2. 1. Go back to the BackEnd (admin/store)
2. Set priority of the price list assignment #2 higher than the priority of price list assignment #2.
3. Go to the storefront. 
4. Reload the page. 
5. Go to the product from preconditions. 
6. Pay attention to the product price.

Title: Delete price > Next price by priority is shown on the StoreFront

1. The price has changed. 
2. Product price = price that has a higher priority among the two remaining
Preconditions:
1. There are three prices with different priorities for the same product. 
2. Price with higher priority is displayed as a product price on the StoreFront.

2. Go to the product from preconditions. 
3. Pay attention to the price.

2. Go to the product from preconditions. 
3. Pay attention to the price.

The product price = price specified in the EUR price list.

2. Go to the product from preconditions. 
3. Pay attention to the price.
2. 1. Switch currency to EUR. 
2. Go to the product from preconditions. 
3. Pay attention to the price.
